title: Word Formation: Prefixes and Suffixes
description: Master the art of deriving new words at C1 — noun/adjective/verb/adverb suffixes (-tion, -ity, -ment, -ous, -ise, -ly), negative prefixes (un-, in-, im-, ir-, il-, dis-, mis-), choosing the right form for the gap, and avoiding common errors in word-class selection.
sources: CEFR C1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Martin Hewings, Advanced Grammar in Use (word formation: suffixes, prefixes, Units 96–100)
